title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Master the core concepts of machine learning from supervised and unsupervised learning to model evaluation and real-world applications.

modules.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
modules.description: Understand what machine learning is and explore its applications

modules.title: Supervised Learning
modules.description: Learn about classification and regression techniques

modules.title: Unsupervised Learning
modules.description: Explore clustering and dimensionality reduction methods

modules.title: Model Evaluation & Validation
modules.description: Master techniques for evaluating and improving models

modules.title: Real-World Applications
modules.description: See how ML is applied to solve practical problems
